description: Manufactured identity for text (cell-model.md § Manufactured identity). Three layers: in-band anchors (exact, survive body rewrite), content-derived hashes of whitespace-normalized text (survive reflow/reorder, change on edit), and word-LCS similarity alignment (>= 0.5 => Edited/key-inherited; below => Inserted). Keys carry an a:/c: prefix so anchored and content keyspaces never collide.

scenarios.name: content key survives reflow but not edit
anchored key survives full body rewrite
pure reorder is all Same, no removed
small edit is Edited not Insert+Remove

old.text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

new.text: the quick brown fox jumps over the sleepy dog

old.text: second paragraph will be tweaked a little

new.text: second paragraph will be tweaked a bit
